/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmmp_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libmmp_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/mmp_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/mmp_interfaces/msg/human_trajectory__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mmp_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/mmp_interfaces/msg/human_trajectory_array__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mmp_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/mmp_interfaces/msg/motion_prediction_result__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/michael/ros2_ws_test/build/mmp_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmmp_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
